title: FarmRakshak
subtitle: AI-Powered Crop Lodging Detection & Structural Damage Assessment
description: Upload a photograph of your crop field and our AI system will instantly analyze lodging severity, assess structural damage, and provide actionable recommendations to help protect your yield.
healthy_desc: Crops are standing upright with no signs of structural stress.
mild_desc: Minor tilting detected. Early signs of lodging present.
moderate_desc: Significant tilting observed. Structural damage is progressing.
severe_desc: Crops are heavily collapsed. Immediate intervention required.
rec_healthy: No action needed. Continue regular monitoring every 7-10 days. Maintain optimal irrigation and nutrient schedule.
rec_mild: Monitor the field closely every 3-5 days. Check soil moisture levels. Avoid over-irrigation. Evaluate wind exposure and consider windbreaks.
rec_moderate: Adjust irrigation to prevent further root weakening. Apply potassium-rich fertilizer to strengthen stalks. Consider mechanical support for affected areas. Consult your local agronomist.
rec_severe: Consider early harvesting to minimize further losses. Assess salvageable yield before complete lodging. Document damage for insurance claims. Prioritize soil restoration for the next crop cycle.
no_image: Please upload an image to begin analysis.
error_msg: Unable to process this image. Please ensure the file is a valid crop field photograph and try again.
about_text: FarmRakshak uses deep learning (EfficientNet-B0) trained on crop field images to detect lodging the bending or falling of crop stalks caused by wind, rain, or disease. Early detection helps farmers take timely action and minimize yield loss.
voice_output_hint: Hear the result in your language. Works offline in Chrome/Firefox.
no_loss_expected: No yield loss expected. Crop is healthy.
no_history: No history yet. Save a snapshot to start tracking.
trend_worsening: Lodging is getting WORSE. Take action immediately.
trend_improving: Condition is IMPROVING. Continue current management.
trend_insufficient: Save more snapshots for trend analysis.
pmfby_subtitle: Generate a digital damage report for your crop insurance claim.
report_ready: Report generated! Click above to download.
farmer_name_required: Please enter farmer name to generate report.
pmfby_info_text: PMFBY is India's national crop insurance scheme. Use this report as digital evidence for insurance claims. Call 14447 for help.
